action.reasoning: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut achieved a new best test AUC of 0.7650. The validation AUC was still slightly increasing or plateauing at epoch 20. Analysis: I will try adding LayerNorm to the DeepOut module to improve stability and generalization, and use a CosineAnnealingLR scheduler over 25 epochs to allow the model to converge more smoothly. I will also implement an LSTM version for future comparison. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py to include DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut_LN and DKT_Concat_LSTM_DeepOut_LN. Train the GRU version for 25 epochs and submit for evaluation.
